title: Trevi IV
content:

{{Quote|Greetings, Gentlebeings. Please permit me to welcome you to Trevi.|Fiz Cor'gril, to his customers|<ref name="Journal 9" />}}
'''Trevi IV''', also known as '''Trevi''', was a dry [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of barren plains and [[Desert/Legends|deserts]]. It was situated along several [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]] and lay in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Quess sector/Legends|Quess sector]]. A [[Truishii]] [[Merchant/Legends|trader]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] was forced to land on Trevi IV at some point to make repairs. The Truishii subsequently decided to establish a [[Colonist/Legends|colony]] at the landing site, which quickly developed into the large [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] [[City/Legends|settlement]] known as [[Trevi City]]. The planet itself eventually became a trade world inhabited by thirty-five million [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] of various [[Species/Legends|species]].

Two [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Fiz Cor'gril]] arrived on Trevi IV, bought an old [[Hangar/Legends|garage]] complex in Trevi City, and established the used starship dealership known as [[Fizzi's Slightly Used Starships]]. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the Galactic Civil War, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] maintained a token presence on the planet in the form of a small post outside Trevi City.

==Description==
Trevi IV, also referred to simply as Trevi, was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Trevi system/Legends|Trevi system]], a part of the [[Quess sector/Legends|Quess sector]]<ref name="Journal 9" /> in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="TEA" /> The planet occupied the fourth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position in its [[Star system/Legends|star system]], which was located along several [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]] used in interstellar [[Merchant/Legends|commerce]]. The planet's [[Local day/Legends|day]] lasted twenty-eight [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]], and its [[Local year|year]] consisted of 389 local [[Standard day/Legends|days]].<ref name="Journal 9" />

The planet had standard [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] and a breathable Type I [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. Although the climate on Trevi IV was temperate in general, the [[Temperature/Legends|temperatures]] were high in the [[Trevi City]] [[City/Legends|settlement]], particularly during the day. The terrain of the nondescript planet included barren plains, [[Desert/Legends|deserts]], plateaus, and urbanized areas. Trevi IV's [[Hydrosphere/Legends|hydrosphere]] was dry, but there were at least two bodies of surface [[Water/Legends|water]] on the planet.<ref name="Journal 9" />

==History==
[[File:Fizzi.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Fiz Cor'gril established and ran a used starship dealership on Trevi IV.]]
At some point, a caravan of [[Truishii]] traders passing the Trevi system experienced an accident in [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. A Truishii [[Starship/Legends|starship]] was then forced to land on Trevi IV so that it could be repaired. Instead of moving on when the ship was repaired, however, the traders decided to establish a [[Colonist/Legends|colony]] on the planet.<ref name="Journal 9" />

Due to Trevi IV's location along several trade routes, the Truishii colony rapidly developed into the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] settlement known as Trevi City. The [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] entrepreneur [[Fiz Cor'gril]], also known as "Fizzi," arrived on Trevi IV slightly more than twenty [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], after the Trevi City's spaceport had been refurbished.<ref name="Journal 9" />

At the [[Time/Legends|time]] of Cor'gril's arrival, an old starship [[Hangar/Legends|garage]] was being forced out of business, and the Bith was able to acquire the complex. Cor'gril eventually used it to start a used starship dealership called [[Fizzi's Slightly Used Starships]], which he continued to run for more than two [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]]. When the orphaned [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Thief/Legends|thief]] [[Shanna Kinn]] arrived on Trevi IV and attempted to steal parts from Cor'gril's starship lot, the Bith caught the [[Gender/Legends|woman]]. Impressed with her skills, Cor'gril recruited Kinn to work at his dealership.<ref name="Journal 9" />

==Inhabitants==
{{Quote|I am named Fiz Cor'gril. You may call me Fizzi, if you so wish.|Fiz Cor'gril, to his customers|<ref name="Journal 9" />}}
Trevi IV was a trade world inhabited by thirty-five million [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] beings of various [[Species/Legends|species]], including Humans and [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] from a thousand worlds, such as the Truishii, the original settlers of the planet. The Bith owner of the used starship dealership known as Fizzi's Slightly Used Starships, Fizz Cor'gril, worked in Trevi City, as did his employees, which included the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] mechanic [[Garginoolaara]] and the Human acquisitions specialist Shanna Kinn. The inhabitants of Trevi IV imported [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuffs]] and medical supplies on their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] while exporting luxury goods and technology to the wider [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]].<ref name="Journal 9" />

==Locations==
{{Main|Trevi City}}
{{Quote|I am the proprietor of this establishment which deals with the sale of slightly used starships.|Fiz Cor'gril, on Fizzi's Slightly Used Starships|<ref name="Journal 9" />}}
The expansive spaceport settlement known as Trevi City developed from the original Truishii colony, which was located near the largest body of water on Trevi IV. The congested streets of the city were filled with various sounds and lights and bustled with merchants, customers, street performers, and [[Con artist/Legends|con artists]]. Numerous shops of various sizes helped maintain a bazaar-like atmosphere throughout the city.<ref name="Journal 9" />

The used starship dealership Fizzi's Slightly Used Starships was located in a large garage complex that was situated in the southwestern sector of Trevi City, at the edge of the settlement's starport district. To provide relief from the high temperatures outside, the air in the dealership's garage was kept cool. During the Galactic Civil War, a small post located just outside Trevi City constituted the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] token presence both on Trevi IV and in its [[Star/Legends|star]] system.<ref name="Journal 9" />

==Behind the scenes==
Trevi IV was first mentioned in "[[Fizzi's Slightly Used Starships (article)|Fizzi's Slightly Used Starships]]," a [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|roleplaying game]] source article written by [[John J. Richardson III]] and published in the [[February]] [[1996]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 9|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 9]].<ref name="Journal 9" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Trevi system, and therefore Trevi IV, in grid square N-17.<ref name="TEA" />
